sentiment_score_definition: x <= -0.35: Bearish; -0.35 < x <= -0.15: Somewhat-Bearish; -0.15 < x < 0.15: Neutral; 0.15 <= x < 0.35: Somewhat_Bullish; x >= 0.35: Bullish
relevance_score_definition: 0 < x <= 1, with a higher score indicating higher relevance.

feed.title: Desjardins Cuts Canadian National Railway (TSE:CNR) Price Target to C$160.00
feed.summary: Desjardins has lowered its price target for Canadian National Railway (TSE:CNR) from C$161.00 to C$160.00, while maintaining a "buy" rating. This new target suggests a potential upside of 17.30% from the stock's current trading price. The company currently holds a "Moderate Buy" consensus rating among analysts, with a target price around C$153.33.

feed.title: This Popular Growth Stock Just Hit a Wall. What Comes Next?
feed.summary: Advanced Micro Devices (AMD) stock recently experienced an unexplained pullback despite strong AI chip advancements and positive announcements. While the immediate cause of the sell-off is unclear, potentially due to "selling the news" or unmet expectations, the long-term outlook remains bullish. AMD's leadership expects massive AI growth, requiring significant compute increases, and forecasts substantial revenue and data center business growth, suggesting its current valuation is attractive.

feed.title: Intel, Salesforce among market cap stock movers on Tuesday By Investing.com
feed.summary: Tuesday's market saw significant stock movements for various companies. Intel and Moderna experienced rallies, while Salesforce and Regencell Bioscience Holdings faced declines due to news and other market factors. The article categorizes these movers by market capitalization, highlighting specific companies and reasons for their performance.

feed.title: Will Dollar Tree prices increase in 2026?
feed.summary: Dollar Tree is transforming its pricing model in 2026, moving away from the traditional "everything for a dollar" to a "multi-price" model (Dollar Tree 3.0). This change, which began with a base price increase to $1.25 in 2021, will introduce items up to $10, including higher-quality personal care, electronics, and branded products. The company plans to open new stores in key states while closing underperforming locations, aiming to enhance the customer experience and compete with traditional supermarkets.

feed.title: Citigroup Raises Price Target for General Dynamics (GD) to $389
feed.summary: Citigroup has increased its price target for General Dynamics (GD) to $389 while maintaining a "Neutral" rating. This adjustment reflects Citigroup's confidence in the company, though other analysts have recently given varying ratings and price targets, with an average target from 19 analysts suggesting a 5.50% upside from the current price. General Dynamics is a defense contractor and business jet manufacturer with segments in aerospace, marine, combat systems, and technologies.

feed.title: ROYAL CARIBBEAN INVITES KIDS NAMED DOROTHY, HENRY AND SHIRLEY TO SAIL FOR FREE ON WIGGLY-THEMED HOLIDAYS IN 2026
feed.summary: Royal Caribbean is partnering with The Wiggles for a second year, offering three exclusive Wiggly-themed sailings from Sydney and Brisbane in summer 2026/2027. To celebrate and tap into the trend of vintage names, children named Dorothy, Henry, or Shirley can sail for free on these cruises. The sailings will feature Wiggles characters and a range of family-friendly activities.

feed.title: Investment giant pays $32.7M for two Sugar Creek sites in latest Charlotte acquisition
feed.summary: Blackstone, a New York-based investment firm, recently acquired 20.5 acres in Charlotte's Sugar Creek neighborhood for $32.7 million. This purchase more than doubles what the previous owners paid about four years ago and adds to Blackstone's growing portfolio of industrial acquisitions in the area. The acquisition signifies a continued interest in the Charlotte market by major investment groups.

feed.title: Baird Adjusts Price Target on McKesson to $968 From $928, Maintains Outperform Rating
feed.summary: Baird has raised its price target for McKesson Corporation (MCK) to $968 from $928, while reaffirming an Outperform rating on the stock. This adjustment reflects Baird's continued positive outlook on the pharmaceutical distribution company. The news was published on January 13, 2026.

feed.title: Hilton Announces Fourth Quarter and Full Year 2025 Earnings Release Date
feed.summary: Hilton Worldwide Holdings Inc. (NYSE: HLT) will report its fourth quarter and full year 2025 financial results before the stock market opens on Wednesday, February 11, 2026. The company will host a conference call at 9 a.m. EST with Christopher J. Nassetta and Kevin Jacobs to discuss performance and answer questions. A live webcast and replay will be available on the Hilton Investor Relations website.

feed.title: Microsoft releases Windows 10 KB5073724 extended security update
feed.summary: Microsoft has issued the KB5073724 extended security update for Windows 10, addressing three zero-day vulnerabilities and providing a fix for expiring Secure Boot certificates. This update is primarily for Windows 10 Enterprise LTSC and ESU program participants, bringing security and bug fixes but no new features. A key aspect of this update is the rollout of targeted fixes for systems to update Secure Boot certificates, preventing potential security bypasses.

feed.title: Morgan Stanley likes these stocks with strong earnings revisions as season begins
feed.summary: As the quarterly reporting season begins, Morgan Stanley recommends investors focus on stocks with strong earnings momentum. The firm identified companies that are projected to be in the top quartile for next-twelve-months earnings per share revisions within consumer discretionary, financials, industrials, and health-care sectors. Robinhood, which has consistently beaten earnings estimates, and Delta Air Lines, which reported mixed results but projects significant earnings growth, are highlighted as promising picks.

feed.title: 2 International ETFs That are Crushing the SPY
feed.summary: The article highlights two international ETFs, iShares MSCI South Korea ETF (EWY) and iShares MSCI Japan ETF (EWJ), that have significantly outperformed the S&P 500 in the past year. EWY saw a 104% gain, largely due to strong performances from Samsung and SK Hynix, while EWJ rose 31%, benefiting from investments by Berkshire Hathaway and attractive valuations. Both ETFs offer diversification and potential value for investors looking beyond the U.S. market.

feed.title: Bank Of America Q4 Preview: Top Buffett Holding Helps Kick Off Earnings Season
feed.summary: Bank of America (BAC) is set to report its fourth-quarter financial results, with analysts expecting a rise in revenue and earnings per share. The report follows JPMorgan Chase & Co's (JPM) strong performance, setting a high bar for BAC. Investors, including Berkshire Hathaway's Warren Buffett and Greg Abel, will be closely watching the results, as Bank of America is a significant holding in Berkshire's portfolio.

feed.title: The Truth About Invitation Homes: Is This Landlord Stock Actually Worth Your Money?
feed.summary: This article examines Invitation Homes (INVH), a major single-family rental REIT, from both an investor's perspective and the social backlash it faces from tenants. It discusses the company's business model, financial stability as a REIT, and the risks associated with its public perception and potential regulation, comparing it to competitor American Homes 4 Rent (AMH). The piece ultimately concludes that INVH can be a solid long-term investment for those seeking real estate exposure and dividends, provided they are comfortable with the ethical complexities and regulatory risks.

feed.title: Cencora Inc.: Quiet Rally, Solid Fundamentals – Is This Healthcare Stock Still Underpriced?
feed.summary: Cencora Inc. (formerly AmerisourceBergen) has shown a strong, steady performance, nearing 52-week highs with an approximate 30% gain over the past year. Analysts mostly rate the stock as a "Buy" with price targets indicating further upside, driven by strong fundamentals, consistent earnings, and strategic expansion into higher-margin specialty services. While currently in a consolidation phase, the company is viewed as a high-quality, defensive play in the pharmaceutical supply chain.

feed.title: L3Harris stock gains as Morgan Stanley reiterates Overweight rating
feed.summary: Morgan Stanley has reiterated its Overweight rating and $367 price target for L3Harris Technologies (NYSE:LHX) after the stock surged significantly. This positive outlook follows news that the Department of War plans to invest $1 billion in L3Harris's Missile Solutions business, which is largely comprised of Aerojet, through a convertible preferred security ahead of its planned IPO in late 2026. L3Harris will retain a majority stake in this new venture, and the investment bank sees this as an "unprecedented structure" that could benefit multiple stakeholders and provide a monetization path for L3Harris.

feed.title: Lotus Technology (NASDAQ:LOT) Shares Gap Down - Time to Sell?
feed.summary: Lotus Technology (NASDAQ:LOT) shares gapped down at Tuesday's open, trading at $1.379 with light volume after closing at $1.41. Analysts, including Weiss Ratings, maintain a "Sell" rating on the stock. Key financial indicators show a market cap of $966.49 million, a negative P/E ratio, and institutional ownership of 63.40%.

feed.title: Delta Air Lines (NYSE:DAL) Shares Gap Down - Should You Sell?
feed.summary: Delta Air Lines' shares gapped down after its Q4 earnings report, where an adjusted EPS of $1.55 beat estimates, but revenue of $14.61 billion missed expectations, leading to investor selling. Despite the revenue shortfall, management remains optimistic, guiding for a strong FY2026 adjusted EPS and focusing on higher-yield premium revenue and ordered new Boeing 787-10s. Analysts largely maintain a "Buy" rating with an average price target of $77.51, suggesting the pullback could be a buying opportunity.

feed.title: AvalonBay Communities (NYSE:AVB) Stock Price Expected to Rise, Barclays Analyst Says
feed.summary: Barclays has increased its price target for AvalonBay Communities (NYSE:AVB) to $217, maintaining an "overweight" rating and suggesting a 22.17% upside. Despite this, the consensus among analysts remains a "Hold" with an average price target of $205.89. The article also notes significant institutional ownership in AVB, with large investors recently expanding their stakes.

feed.title: Form 424B2 BARCLAYS BANK PLC
feed.summary: This SEC filing (Form 424B2) from Barclays Bank PLC details a pricing supplement for $1,500,000 Buffered Callable Contingent Coupon Notes due January 14, 2027. These notes are linked to the performance of three exchange-traded funds: the Utilities Select Sector SPDR® Fund, the State Street Consumer Staples Select Sector SPDR ETF, and the Materials Select Sector SPDR® Fund. The document outlines the terms of the notes, including payment at maturity, contingent coupon conditions, early redemption options, and significant risk considerations for investors, particularly concerning the creditworthiness of Barclays Bank PLC and potential U.K. Bail-in Power.

feed.title: Option Care Health reporta receita de US$ 1,46-1,47 bilhões no 4º trimestre
feed.summary: Option Care Health (NASDAQ:OPCH) divulgou resultados financeiros preliminares não auditados para o quarto trimestre e ano completo de 2025, além de projeções para 2026. A empresa espera uma receita líquida no quarto trimestre entre US$ 1,46 bilhão e US$ 1,47 bilhão, e para o ano de 2025, entre US$ 5,645 bilhões e US$ 5,655 bilhões. A Option Care Health também anunciou uma expansão de seu programa de recompra de ações para US$ 1,0 bilhão e analistas indicam que a empresa pode estar ligeiramente subvalorizada.
feed.source: Investing.com Brasil - Finanças, Câmbio e Investimentos
feed.source_domain: Investing.com Brasil - Finanças, Câmbio e Investimentos

feed.title: Developer behind several Publix, Kroger stores partnering on Mid City Mall project
feed.summary: Branch Properties, an Atlanta-based real estate company specializing in large-scale grocery stores, is partnering with the Metts family on the Mid City Mall project in Louisville's Highlands. The mall, a mixed-use development, has been for sale since November 2024, leading to uncertainty and the closure of several businesses. Branch Properties has a portfolio across eight states, including two Kentucky locations and a majority of Publix stores.

feed.title: Amid Concern Over AI Power Use, Microsoft Swears Off Subsidies
feed.summary: Microsoft has introduced a five-point plan to address concerns about the energy consumption and community impact of its expanding AI infrastructure. The plan includes paying higher utility rates, minimizing water use, creating jobs, contributing to local taxes without seeking subsidies, and investing in local AI training and nonprofits. This initiative comes as tech giants invest heavily in data centers, raising questions about energy costs and tax burdens in communities.

feed.title: Delta Air Lines Posts Q4 Beat But Guidance Disappoints Analyst
feed.summary: Delta Air Lines reported slightly better-than-expected Q4 earnings at $1.55 per share, surpassing consensus and lowered guidance. However, the company's 2026 earnings guidance of $6.50-$7.50 per share, while representing 20% growth, came in below investor expectations and the consensus of $7.28 per share. Goldman Sachs analyst Catherine O’Brien maintained a Buy rating with a $77 price target, noting that the Q4 beat was driven by better-than-expected revenue.

feed.title: Erlinger, McDonald’s USA president, sells $805k in MCD stock
feed.summary: Joseph M. Erlinger, President of McDonald's USA, sold 2,626 shares of McDonald's Corp (NASDAQ:MCD) common stock for approximately $805,079 on January 12, 2026, after exercising options for the same number of shares. Following these transactions, Erlinger directly owns 5,398.12 shares of McDonald’s Corp. This insider transaction comes amidst varying analyst ratings and price target adjustments for McDonald's from several investment firms, reflecting a mixed but generally optimistic market outlook for the company.

feed.title: ArcelorMittal Shelby workers set to strike after failed negotiations
feed.summary: Approximately 450 members of United Steelworkers Local 3057 are planning a strike at ArcelorMittal's Shelby facility starting Tuesday at 11:59 p.m. due to a deadlock in labor negotiations. Despite the pending strike, the union has expressed willingness to continue discussions to reach an agreement, with labor conditions being the central issue. Employees have been working under an extended contract since negotiations began on September 2nd, and both sides are hoping for a last-minute resolution.

feed.title: KKR Real Estate: Oversold, Discounted, The 9% Yielding Preferreds A Buy (NYSE:KREF)
feed.summary: The article suggests that KKR Real Estate Finance Trust Inc.'s Series A preferred shares (KREF.PR.A) are oversold and discounted, offering a 9% current yield. This comes as the mREIT prepares to increase originations in 2026 and expects significant loan repayments, which could lead to positive distributable earnings supporting the preferred share coupon. The author believes these preferred shares are a strong buy given their current trading price relative to their liquidation value.

feed.title: Bank of America Corp Earnings Preview – Stock Pulls Back Leading In (BAC)
feed.summary: Bank of America (BAC) is set to report its fourth-quarter 2025 earnings on January 14, with analysts focusing on the bank's net interest income (NII) trajectory and fee revenue composition. The stock has seen a 4.6% pullback from recent highs, despite being up 21% over the last year. The earnings call will be crucial for validating the NII "build" narrative and management's 2026 guidance, as consensus estimates are already at the high end of their prior NII framework.

feed.title: Healthcare startups see $60B wave as investors return, with more forecast
feed.summary: Healthcare venture markets are showing signs of recovery after several years of caution, with total investment reaching $60 billion across 2,167 deals in 2025, up from $45.4 billion in 2024. This resurgence is driven by improved investment activity, selective reopening of exit markets, and easing macroeconomic pressures, with mega-rounds playing a significant role. HSBC Innovation Banking projects continued growth, expecting healthcare venture investment to hit $65-$70 billion in 2026.

feed.title: Advance Immunotherapy 2.0 Presented at USA-Saudi Biotech Alliance Summit
feed.summary: NantWorks, LLC, and ImmunityBio, Inc. have announced the first U.S.-Saudi Biotech Alliance Summit, scheduled for January 14, 2026, to foster collaboration in biotechnology. The summit aims to accelerate the development and deployment of advanced immunotherapies and healthcare technologies, building on existing partnerships. A key focus will be ANKTIVA® plus BCG vaccine, an FDA-approved immunotherapy for non-muscle invasive bladder cancer, which activates various immune cells for a long-duration response.

feed.title: Thermo Fisher wins contracts as pharma shifts production to US, CEO says
feed.summary: Thermo Fisher Scientific's CEO, Marc Casper, announced that its pharmaceutical services business has secured multiple contracts to facilitate the relocation of drug production from Europe and Asia back to the United States. He noted that this trend, partly driven by potential U.S. tariff policies and government encouragement for reshoring, is expected to be a significant tailwind for the company in 2027 and 2028. Casper also highlighted an improving outlook for biotech funding and overall confidence within the pharmaceutical industry regarding U.S. administration relations and pipeline investments.

feed.title: Why Moderna Stock Strength Is Only Beginning: Technical Analysis
feed.summary: Moderna stock, after a long period of underperformance, is showing signs of a breakout according to technical analysis. The article suggests that the recent gains could be just the beginning of a stronger upward trend for the company's shares. This analysis implies a positive outlook for Moderna's stock performance going forward.

feed.title: Five Star Bancorp Schedules Fourth-Quarter 2025 Results Webcast
feed.summary: Five Star Bancorp announced it will report its financial results for the fourth quarter and full year ended December 31, 2025, after market close on January 26, 2026. Following the report, the company will host a live webcast for analysts and investors on January 27, 2026, to discuss the results. An analyst has a Buy rating on FSBC stock with a $39.00 price target, and TipRanks' AI Analyst, Spark, rates FSBC as Outperform.

feed.title: JPM26: Illumina debuts Billion Cell Atlas to drive AI-driven drug discovery
feed.summary: Illumina has launched the Billion Cell Atlas, a comprehensive genetic dataset designed to accelerate AI-driven drug discovery. This dataset, created in collaboration with AstraZeneca, Eli Lilly, and MSD, maps disease mechanisms across various indications. It aims to improve drug target validation and will be used by companies like MSD to train their AI models.

feed.title: Walmart drone delivery service to expand to 150 more stores across 4 cities
feed.summary: Walmart and Wing announced an expansion of their drone delivery service to 150 additional Walmart stores in four major cities, building on existing operations in Bentonville, Dallas, and Atlanta. This expansion aims to significantly increase Walmart's drone delivery network, with a goal of over 270 locations by 2027. The service, which provides quick delivery of everyday essentials, is being added to Los Angeles, St. Louis, Cincinnati, and Miami, among other locations.

feed.title: JPM26: Medtronic touts billion-dollar market opportunity for Altaviva
feed.summary: Medtronic CEO Geoff Martha highlighted a billion-dollar market opportunity for Altaviva, its recently FDA-approved device for urge urinary incontinence (UUI) treatment, at the J.P. Morgan Healthcare Conference. Since its approval in September 2025, over 500 physicians have been trained to deploy the implantable device. Martha noted that roughly 1% penetration of the five million US patients actively seeking UUI treatment could generate $1 billion in revenue, and Medtronic plans direct-to-consumer awareness initiatives.

feed.title: Will Apple (AAPL) Beat Estimates Again in Its Next Earnings Report?
feed.summary: Apple (AAPL) is expected to beat its next earnings estimates, continuing a trend of outperforming expectations. The company has a positive Zacks Earnings ESP of +0.41% and a Zacks Rank #3 (Hold), which historically leads to a positive surprise in nearly 70% of cases. Apple's last two quarterly reports showed an average surprise of 8.75%, with the next earnings report anticipated on January 29, 2026.

feed.title: Ford Motor (NYSE:F) Given New $12.80 Price Target at HSBC
feed.summary: HSBC has increased its price target for Ford Motor (NYSE:F) from $9.80 to $12.80, maintaining a "hold" rating, but this new target still suggests an 8.41% potential downside from the stock's previous close. Despite varied analyst opinions with a consensus "Hold" rating and an average price target of $12.55, Ford recently beat its Q3 earnings estimates. The company also shows positive sentiment from Zacks regarding strong earnings-surprise history, inclusion in a top income stocks list, and CEO praise from Jim Cramer, alongside significant institutional investment activity.

feed.title: Gordon Reid's Top Picks: Meta, Morgan Stanley & RTX Corp
feed.summary: This article highlights Gordon Reid's top stock picks: Meta, Morgan Stanley, and RTX Corp. It also features Darren Sissons, partner and portfolio manager at Campbell, Lee & Ross Investment Management, who shares his own stock picks and market outlooks. The content includes a series of videos from other financial experts discussing their top picks and market insights from the past few days.

feed.title: Zimmer Biomet down after cautious remarks on outlook (ZBH:NYSE)
feed.summary: Zimmer Biomet Holdings (ZBH) shares fell to a session low after the company expressed caution regarding its outlook during its presentation at the J.P. Morgan Healthcare Conference. The orthopedic device maker's remarks led to a negative market reaction.

feed.title: T Expands IoT Connectivity Portfolio: Will it Boost Prospects?
feed.summary: AT&T (T) has introduced AT&T IoT Network Intelligence, a new solution aimed at improving visibility for enterprises using connected devices. This offering helps organizations better understand IoT device performance, troubleshoot issues faster, and leverage insightful analytics across various sectors. The company is positioning itself to capitalize on the rapidly growing global IoT market, facing competition from Verizon and T-Mobile.

feed.title: Boeing turnaround takes hold with highest annual jet deliveries since 2018
feed.summary: Boeing achieved its highest annual jet deliveries since 2018 and surpassed Airbus in net orders for the first time in seven years, indicating a significant turnaround after a series of crises. The company delivered 600 aircraft in 2025 and booked 1,075 net new orders, showing strong demand for its 737 MAX and 787 Dreamliner jets. Analysts believe Boeing's strong order book signals confidence from airlines and predict continued improvement in 2026.

feed.title: BD expansion could mean 100+ jobs in Columbus
feed.summary: BD (Becton, Dickinson and Company), a pharmaceutical manufacturer based in Columbus, Nebraska, is investing $110 million into a major expansion of its Columbus facility. This expansion aims to increase the production of pre-fillable syringes and is expected to create approximately 120 new jobs by mid-year. The company had previously invested $35 million into the same facility to produce more pre-filled flush syringes, which also added around 50 new jobs.

feed.title: Earnings call transcript: Bank of New York Mellon Q4 2025 beats EPS, stock dips
feed.summary: Bank of New York Mellon (BNY) reported Q4 2025 earnings, exceeding analyst expectations with an EPS of $2.08 and revenue of $5.18 billion. Despite the strong financial performance, including a record net income of $5.3 billion for 2025, the stock experienced a pre-market decline of 1.48%. The company shared an optimistic outlook for 2026, targeting approximately 5% revenue growth, and raised its medium-term financial targets, emphasizing strategic investments in AI and digital assets to drive future growth and efficiency.

feed.title: Adobe stock hits 52-week low at $311.55 By Investing.com
feed.summary: Adobe Systems Incorporated (ADBE) stock has fallen to a new 52-week low of $311.55, marking a 24.42% decline over the past year. This downturn is attributed to broader market challenges, investor concerns, and increased competition, leading to multiple analyst downgrades from firms like Goldman Sachs, BMO Capital, and Jefferies. Despite strong Q4 2025 results, the company faces headwinds from AI-enhanced alternatives and competitive pressures.

feed.title: GILT: Strong growth in satellite networking, with major gains in defense, IFC, and global expansion
feed.summary: Gilat Satellite Networks Ltd. (GILT) is experiencing rapid growth in its satellite networking solutions, driven by increased capacity and lower launch costs. Key areas of expansion include defense, in-flight connectivity (IFC), and growth in Peru. The company's strong financial outlook and strategic acquisitions are further fueling this expansion, as highlighted in their 28th Annual Needham Growth Conference.

feed.title: Adobe stock hits 52-week low at $311.55 By Investing.com
feed.summary: Adobe Systems Incorporated stock has fallen to a new 52-week low of $311.55, marking a 24.42% decline over the past year due to market challenges and investor concerns. The company has faced multiple analyst downgrades from firms like Goldman Sachs, BMO Capital, Jefferies, and KeyBanc, citing competitive pressures, AI-enhanced alternatives, and P/E multiple discounts. Despite strong fourth-quarter performance, these downgrades highlight the challenging landscape for Adobe amidst evolving market dynamics.

feed.title: The Analyst Verdict: Live Nation Entertainment In The Eyes Of 12 Experts
feed.summary: Twelve analysts have recently provided their insights on Live Nation Entertainment (NYSE: LYV), with a mix of bullish to bearish sentiments. The average 12-month price target is $172.42, a 2.74% decrease from the previous average. The article details individual analyst actions, ratings, and price targets, alongside a financial overview of Live Nation Entertainment, highlighting its revenue growth, net margin, return on equity, and debt management.

feed.title: JPM26: Boston Scientific strengthens urology portfolio with Valencia Technologies acquisition
feed.summary: Boston Scientific has acquired Valencia Technologies to enhance its urology and pelvic health portfolio with an implantable tibial nerve stimulation (ITNS) treatment, specifically Valencia's eCoin device for urge urinary incontinence. This acquisition builds on Boston Scientific's previous strategy of bolstering its neuromodulation offerings, including the 2024 acquisition of Axonics. The deal positions Boston Scientific to compete with Medtronic in the UUI treatment market and contributes to its broader strategy in neurological devices, with the global neurology devices market projected to exceed $25 billion by 2034.

feed.title: Chipotle lovers: How to score free chicken, steak, carnitas today only
feed.summary: Chipotle is offering its Rewards members a special one-day deal on January 13, 2026, where they can get a free extra serving of protein (chicken, steak, carnitas, etc.) with online orders. To redeem the offer, members must use the promo code PROTEIN when ordering a burrito, bowl, or salad with double protein through the Chipotle app or website. This promotion comes as many people focus on health and fitness goals at the start of the new year and applies to items on Chipotle's recently launched High Protein Menu.
